economic_notes: Subsidiaries include Wiikwemkoong Board of Education, Wikwemikong Development Commission, Wikwemikong Tribal Police Service, Wikwemikong Nursing Home, Wikwemikong Property Management Company Limited (Rainbow Ridge Golf Course), and FirstTEL Communications Corporation. GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Your Dollar Store With More and Great Lakes Hospitality Group Limited Partnership.
notes: Total revenues include deferred contributions from beginning of year ($6,596,142). Excess of revenues over expenditures for the year is net of deferred contributions end of year ($7,360,319) and funding repaid or repayable to funders ($132,524). The osr figure of $54,254,858 represents 'Other revenues' as reported; it likely includes a mix of own-source and other government transfers not broken out further in these pages. Consolidated entity includes 6 fully consolidated subsidiaries and 2 entities accounted for by modified equity method. Net debt position of $14,342,159.
